title: Oil India Recruitment 2026 - Apply Online for 10 Economist, Deputy Chief Engineer and More Posts
organization: Oil India Limited (OIL) – Maharatna Central Public Sector Undertaking
post_name: Deputy Chief Chemist, Deputy Chief Geologist, Deputy Chief Engineer (Reservoir), Deputy Chief Geophysicist, Deputy Chief Engineer (S&E), Economist
short_info: Oil India Limited is recruiting 10 posts across Deputy Chief Chemist, Deputy Chief Geologist, Deputy Chief Engineer (Reservoir/S&E), Deputy Chief Geophysicist and Economist in Grade D/E/F, last date for online application 28 June 2026.

important_dates.interview_date: To be intimated to shortlisted candidates via email only

age_limit.details: The upper age limit is calculated as on 28-06-2026. After applying all applicable age relaxations (including for internal candidates), the maximum upper age limit shall in no case exceed 54 years for any candidate.

qualification.details: All candidates must be Indian nationals. Only full-time post-qualification work experience in Executive cadre counts as relevant work experience. Experience from academic, research, fellowship, consultancy, apprenticeship, internship, JRF/SRF, PhD scholar, project-based or part-time roles is explicitly excluded. All essential educational qualifications must be from Universities/Institutions recognized by appropriate statutory authorities in India. | Additional condition for candidates in regular Government/PSU employment: Must have minimum 2 years' experience in the next lower pay scale or equivalent (as per Table-III in the notification - IDA/CDA/PSB pay equivalence chart). Candidates from private sector companies must belong to organizations with a minimum annual turnover of Rs. 500 Crores.

vacancy_details.Core Functional Areas: Drilling/workover fluid preparation, testing and quality control; wellsite chemical management; inventory, documentation and chemical operations at drilling/workover sites; cementing, oil spotting, loss control and well kick management support
vacancy_details.Key Tools / Domain Knowledge Required: Drilling fluid rheology; HSE compliance; chemical operations management

vacancy_details.Core Functional Areas: Geological studies and interpretation; basin analysis; wellsite geology; mud logging; core and cuttings analysis; formation evaluation; well log interpretation; subsurface evaluation and field development planning; technical report and map preparation
vacancy_details.Key Tools / Domain Knowledge Required: Petrel, Kingdom Suite or equivalent geological software; sedimentology; structural geology; geo-statistics

vacancy_details.Core Functional Areas: Reservoir characterization and modelling; hydrocarbon reserves estimation (SPE/PRMS); dynamic reservoir simulation; field development planning; well and reservoir performance monitoring; enhanced oil recovery studies
vacancy_details.Key Tools / Domain Knowledge Required: ECLIPSE, CMG or equivalent simulation software; decline curve analysis; material balance methods

vacancy_details.Core Functional Areas: 2D/3D seismic data acquisition and processing; seismic interpretation (AVO, inversion, attributes); gravity/magnetic/EM surveys; integration of geophysical, geological and GIS data; prospect generation and basin modelling
vacancy_details.Key Tools / Domain Knowledge Required: Modern geophysical software; machine learning for interpretation; VSP; quantitative interpretation techniques

vacancy_details.Core Functional Areas: Safety Management Systems (SMS); HSE inspections, audits, risk assessments; incident/accident investigation; statutory compliance (Factories Act, DGMS, OISD, PNGRB, PESO, CPCB/SPCB); EIA/EMP; environmental auditing; ESG/CSR/BRSR/GRI/SBTi/SDG framework integration
vacancy_details.Key Tools / Domain Knowledge Required: ISO 14001; GIS/environmental modelling tools; HSE data analysis; emergency response planning

vacancy_details.Core Functional Areas: Business/investment opportunity identification and evaluation; domestic/global economic monitoring; due diligence for ventures; overseas regulatory/compliance coordination; stakeholder relationship management; risk-weighted portfolio management; briefing papers and presentations for Management/Government
vacancy_details.Key Tools / Domain Knowledge Required: Econometric software; SWOT/trend analysis; financial modelling; E&P sector regulatory knowledge

salary_details.pay_scale: Grade D: Rs. 90,000–2,40,000 | Grade E/F: Rs. 1,00,000–2,60,000 (Approx. Gross: ~Rs. 1,70,000/month in Grade D; ~Rs. 2,00,000/month in Grade E/F)

selection_process: Stage 1 Screening of online applications against prescribed eligibility criteria (shortlisting) All Posts
Stage 2 Personal Interview (PI) - selection based solely on PI performance, subject to document verification and eligibility compliance All Posts
Stage 3 Pre-Employment Medical Examination (PEME) - final appointment only after declaration of medical fitness by OIL Medical Board All Posts (Provisionally Selected Candidates)
how_to_apply: Candidates must apply online only through the OIL website. No other mode of application will be accepted. Printouts of online applications should NOT be sent to OIL by post or hand.

Step I – Sign Up / Registration: Visit https://www.oil-india.com/advertisement-list and click on "Advertisement for Recruitment of Officers in Grade D/E/F in OIL." Select the post, fill in personal details, valid email ID and mobile number. Complete OTP authentication. Note down the Application Number and password received on registered email/mobile.

Step II – Complete Application Form: Fill in Basic Details, Address, Qualification Details, Eligibility Details, Experience Details. Upload photo, signature and scanned certificates. Click "Submit" to finalize.
important_instructions: Only Indian nationals are eligible to apply. The Cut-off date for all matters - age, experience, qualification - is 28-06-2026. Mere possession of minimum qualifications does not entitle candidates to be called for PI; shortlisting criteria may be raised if the number of applications is large. Candidates in permanent Government/PSU employment must produce a valid NOC from their employer at the time of PI - without this they will not be permitted to appear and travel fares will not be reimbursed. Appointment of provisionally selected candidates is subject to medical fitness as per OIL's Physical Fitness criteria; candidature is cancelled if declared unfit by OIL's Medical Board. Provisionally selected candidates will serve a probationary period of 1 year and will be confirmed in writing after successful completion. Any false information or document at any stage - even after joining - will result in cancellation/termination and blacklisting from all future OIL recruitments. All future announcements for this vacancy will be published only on www.oil-india.com - not on any other website or medium. OIL has warned all candidates about fraudulent fake appointment letters being circulated by unscrupulous elements - OIL does not authorize any person/organization outside OIL to offer jobs on its behalf. Any dispute regarding recruitment under this advertisement will be under the jurisdiction of Dibrugarh District Court only. Canvassing in any form will result in cancellation of candidature. OIL strives to have a gender-balanced workforce and women candidates are encouraged to apply.
